    ABC - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols

    Add an article with a specified quantity to the list.

    Adds hover and press effects to a button by changing its background color.

    Adds a log entry to the log file and logs it using Log4j.

    Adds a log entry for the given order and user.
    addNewCategory(String, int, int) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleUtils
    Add a new category with a given name and range, then save it to the categories.json file

    Adds a new note to the database with the given title and content.

    Add a QR code ID to the list of imported QR codes.

    Add a specified quantity to an article's stock

    adjustColumnWidths(JTable, JScrollPane, int[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.JFrameUtils
    Dynamically adjusts the column widths of a JTable based on the available width of its enclosing JScrollPane and a set of base column widths.

    ALLOWED_TABLES - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DatabaseManager
    Whitelist of allowed table names for clearTable() to prevent SQL injection.

    Applies theme colors and fonts to UIManager defaults.

    Applies a consistent color palette to a JButton, including hover and pressed states, based on a given base background color.

    Applies theme colors and fonts to UIManager defaults.

    Article - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes
    Represents a catalog article with inventory and pricing data.
    Article(String, String, String, int, int, double, double, String) - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Article
    Creates a new article instance.
    ARTICLE_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    ArticleDialog - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.dialogs
    This class provides static methods to display dialogs for adding and updating articles.
    ArticleExporter - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils
    Utility to export a JTable with article data into a PDF file.
    articleGUI - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.MainGUI
    IMPORTANT: These are the actual content frames for each tab.
    ArticleGUI - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    ArticleGUI with category support for better organization.
    ArticleGUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.ArticleGUI
    Initializes the ArticleGUI, sets up the layout, loads categories and articles, and configures interactions.
    ArticleGUI.CategoryRange - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    Helper class to represent a category and its associated article number range.
    ArticleGUI.RoundedPanel - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    A custom JPanel with rounded corners and a specified background color.
    articleListGUI - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.main.Main
    Main GUI instance, responsible for displaying the main application window.
    ArticleListGUI - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    The ArticleListGUI class provides a graphical user interface for displaying and managing a list of articles along with their quantities.
    ArticleListGUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.ArticleListGUI
    Constructs the ArticleListGUI window, initializes the UI components, and sets up event listeners.
    ArticleManager - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers
    ArticleManager with intelligent caching for improved performance.
    ArticleQrCodeDialog - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.dialogs
    Dialog for importing QR code scan data from the server.
    ArticleQrPreviewDialog - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.dialogs
    Dialog for previewing QR codes for selected articles and exporting them as a PDF.
    ArticleStatsDialog - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.dialogs
    Renders the article statistics dialog based on the current table model.
    ArticleUtils - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils
    The ArticleUtils class provides utility methods for handling articles, including loading and managing article categories from a JSON file, calculating prices for filling based on article details, and determining the category of an article based on its number.
    ArticleUtils.VolumeUnit - Enum-Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils
    Enum representing volume units for price calculation, such as liters and milliliters.
    ARTIKELNUMMER - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
